debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
l : List (List α)
l1 : List α
idx idx1 : ℕ
hidx : idx < l.length
hidx1 : idx1 < l1.length
⊢ ∃ idx',
    (l.set idx (l1.eraseIdx idx1)).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten.eraseIdx ↑idx' ∧
      l1[idx1] = (l.set idx l1).flatten[idx']

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
simpa using hidx⟩ := by
            simpa [List.get_set_eq, hidx1]
          have : l1[idx1] ∈ (l.set idx l1).flatten := by
            exact List.mem_flatten_of_mem this
          simpa [lflat] using this
        obtain ⟨idx', hidx'⟩ := in_list_idx (l := lflat) (x := l1[idx1]) hin
        refine ⟨idx', ?_, ?_⟩
        · subst lflat
          simpa [hidx'] using congrArg (fun t => t.eraseIdx idx') (rfl : (l.set idx l1).flatten = (l.set idx l1).flatten)
        · simpa [lflat] using hidx'
